//: Collections run serially. The InMemory unit tests and the Testcontainers integration tests share one test-host process; running 171 InMemory-EF classes in parallel with concurrent real-Postgres connection storms (the stock-race and coupon stress tests each fan out 6-10 simultaneous connections) crashes the host (MSBUILD MSB4166 'child node exited prematurely'). Serializing collections keeps `dotnet test` on the whole solution stable; the unit suite is still only ~30s. The concurrency the stock-race tests exercise is created explicitly inside each test via Task.WhenAll, so it is unaffected by this setting.
